Command:
ROLL_CAPTURE_TRANSCRIPT=1 pnpm --filter @roll/infra exec vitest run test/workspace-discovery.e2e.test.ts --reporter=verbose

Observed decision from an arbitrary /tmp cwd (macOS resolves it to /private/tmp):
{
  "requestedCwd": "/tmp",
  "actualCwd": "/private/tmp",
  "requirement": "jira:APE-234",
  "onlyActiveWorkspace": "roll",
  "decision": {
    "ok": false,
    "kind": "activation_required",
    "code": "workspace_activation_required",
    "candidates": [
      {
        "workspaceId": "fields",
        "lifecycle": "registered",
        "hardMatch": true
      }
    ],
    "diagnostics": []
  }
}

The only active Workspace was roll, but it had no hard match for APE-234 and was not selected.
